title: Close completed epics without backlog blockers
description: Close open epics whose child tasks are complete and are not blocked by backlog-only work.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

custom.beads_close_reason: Closed completed epics; backlog-only epics left open.
custom.beads_notes: Closed epics tskl-538, tskl-5er, tskl-eyu, and tskl-p3i after confirming all children complete. Left epics with backlog child tasks (tskl-nqs, tskl-l4q, tskl-34w) open.
